disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Skin dry, red, blanching with NO blisters/weeping — superficial (first-degree) sunburn (not partial-thickness)
trigger_question_examples: Any blisters or weeping skin, or is it dry and red?
Does the red skin go pale when you press it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No blisters, it's dry and red, and it goes pale when I press it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No heat-illness features — no severe headache/confusion, no nausea/vomiting, no dizziness/faintness, no very high temperature; well hydrated
trigger_question_examples: Any severe headache, confusion, nausea/vomiting, or feeling faint?
Have you been able to keep drinking and passing urine normally?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No headache/confusion/nausea, not faint, and I'm drinking and passing urine normally.
